nasb.text: For they were hearing them speaking with tongues and exalting God. Then Peter answered,

esv.text: For they were hearing them speaking in tongues and extolling God. Then Peter declared,

cnv.text: 原來聽見他們講方言，尊　神為大。於是彼得說：

ccb.text: 因为他们听见这些人又说方言又赞美上帝。于是彼得说：

csbs.text: 因为他们听见外邦人说着殊言，又尊神为大。 于是彼得说：
